arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim delivers swift Man Utd reality check after pulsating Lyon comeback
arts.sum: Manchester United advanced into the semi-finals of the Europa League with their European results covering for a horrendous Premier League campaign - which Ruben Amorim admits doesn't reflect well

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals the inspiration for Man United's remarkable comeback against Lyon as Red Devils reach Europa League semi-finals
arts.sum: Man United last night pulled off the great escape to salvage their season by reaching the semi-finals of the Europa League. This club has had so many great European nights but this will be right up there.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Man Utd & Liverpool eye Cherki as Chelsea wanted Van Dijk
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim watched '99' documentary before thrilling Manchester United comeback
arts.sum: The manager said the goal celebrations were the best he had ever heard

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire’s late winner provided ‘best sound in the world’ for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: The Manchester United manager wants to bottle up the roar from the crowd after his team’s comeback win

arts.ttl: Forget it only being the Europa League - this was one of Old Trafford's greatest-ever nights
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED 5-4 LYON (7-6 AGG): It might have only been a victory in the quarter-finals of Europe's second-tier competition - but no-one at Old Trafford will ever forget

arts.ttl: What Andre Onana did after thrilling Man United winner speaks volumes for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim's side qualified for the semi-finals of the Europa League in the most dramatic fashion vs Lyon

arts.ttl: Man United Europa League yellow card rules for semi-final explained amid two suspension risks
arts.sum: Manchester United have qualified for the semi-finals of the Europa League after beating Lyon 7-6 on aggregate at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals what he did to inspire Man Utd's stunning comeback vs Lyon
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has managed to keep Manchester United's Champions League hopes alive with a stunning victory against Lyon at Old Trafford and the Red Devils boss has given his verdict

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand makes Man Utd Europa League vow after Old Trafford 'miracle'
arts.sum: Manchester United booked their place in the Europa League semi-finals with an incredible 5-4 come-from-behind victory over Lyon on Thursday night thanks to Harry Maguire's dramatic winner, leaving club legend Rio Ferdinand speechless in the commentary gantry
